description.en: A registry's publisher and term resolver — published_by plus iri_template or base_url.
description.pt: O editor e o resolvedor de termos de um registro — published_by mais iri_template ou base_url.

description.en: Base URL under which an external database record resolves — a registry's alternative to iri_template.
description.pt: URL base sob a qual um registro de base de dados externo resolve — a alternativa da iri_template de um registro.

description.en: Template resolving a term id to its full IRI, with {id} as the placeholder.
Slug of the organization catalog entry that publishes this registry's id-space.
description.pt: Slug da entrada de catálogo da organização que publica o espaço de ids deste registro.
